style: Kid-friendly semi-realistic puppet pirate portraits with felt textures, stitched details, big expressive eyes and warm Disney-like lighting

inspiration: Puppet movie energy and theatrical expressions
creative_direction.safety: Designed to feel adventurous, funny and reassuring; no horror cues.

usage.background: circular portrait backdrop built in; easy to crop
usage.license_note: Original in-repo characters. Inspired mood only; no direct copies of external IP.

characters.name: Captain Brinebeard
characters.persona: Big-hearted loudmouth who makes every mission feel epic

characters.name: Professor Plankton
characters.persona: Map genius who turns clues into fun stories

characters.name: Pegleg Paco
characters.persona: Playful trickster who loves harmless pranks

characters.name: Cooky Morgan
characters.persona: Chaotic chef who celebrates every win with snacks

characters.name: Young Deckhand Nina
characters.persona: Curious helper who always spots hidden clues

characters.name: Ghostly Gibbs
characters.persona: Silly ghost mentor with gentle spooky jokes
